layout.strategy: Mode B: The Control Room Grid (For Dashboards/Analytics)
layout.grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 sm:gap-6
layout.spacing: Use p-6 or p-8 for internal container padding to prevent text collision.

components.card: bg-white border border-[#E4E4E7] rounded-none shadow-none hover:shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(10,37,64,1)] transition-all duration-200
components.button_primary: bg-[#0A2540] text-white hover:bg-[#1E3A8A] transition-colors rounded-none px-6 py-2 font-bold
components.button_secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#0A2540] text-[#0A2540] hover:bg-[#F4F4F5] transition-colors rounded-none px-6 py-2 font-bold
components.button_whatsapp: bg-[#25D366] text-white hover:bg-[#1DA851] transition-colors rounded-none px-6 py-2 font-bold inline-flex items-center gap-2
components.input: border border-[#E4E4E7] bg-white rounded-none px-4 py-2 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#0A2540] focus:border-transparent transition-all
components.table_header: bg-[#F4F4F5] text-[#71717A] text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] py-3 px-4 border-b border-[#E4E4E7]

key_screens.auth: Centered minimalist card on a subtle 10% grey background, emphasizing security, authority, and trust. Use sharp edges.
key_screens.dashboard: Control Room Grid. Top-left metric: Class Average. Top-right: Quick actions. Middle: 'At Risk' list highlighted with #DC2626 border/text.
key_screens.marks_entry: Dense data table, full width. Input fields should be minimal (border-b only or subtle box) to allow rapid keyboard navigation. Sticky headers for long student lists.
key_screens.student_profile: Two-column layout. Left: Line chart (Recharts) showing marks trend. Right: AI-generated progress summary with a prominent 'Share to WhatsApp' button.
key_screens.parent_update: Dialog/Modal containing the generated AI message with 'Copy' and 'WhatsApp' action buttons.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (kebab-case, role-based).
Use Shadcn components for complex UI (tables, dropdowns, dialogs) but customize them heavily by removing rounded corners (rounded-none) to fit the Swiss Brutalist/High-Contrast archetype.
Implement Recharts for the Student Profile marks over time line chart.
The Marks Entry grid is the most used screen: it must be keyboard friendly, dense, and allow fast tabbing between inputs.
Students falling behind (>15% drop) MUST be highlighted in Red (#DC2626) on the Batch Dashboard. This is a critical business requirement.
For icons, install and use @phosphor-icons/react (e.g., yarn add @phosphor-icons/react) for dense dashboard clarity.
Use Cabinet Grotesk for headings and Manrope for body text. Do NOT use Inter for headings.
No full-screen gradients. Keep backgrounds solid White (#FFFFFF) or 10% Grey (#F4F4F5).
Ensure the 'Share to WhatsApp' action is touch-friendly and uses the brand color #25D366.
For the Marks Entry fast grid, optimize the Shadcn Table component to ensure it stretches to full container height with sticky headers.
Add 'backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70' to any sticky top navigation to maintain the 'Crystal Glass' effect if content scrolls under it.
